title: Come Together! Quartet
overview: Mysterious buttons appear in the worlds of Tanya the Evil, KonoSuba, Overlord, and Re:Zero. When the characters push them, they're taken to a place they'd never imagined...

title: Tension! Introductions
overview: Now that everybody's settled in, it's time for the first day of school, which means everybody has to introduce themselves.

title: Deadlock! Classmates
overview: The students begin to wonder about why they are here, and what this school really is. Tanya, in particular, has a theory about Ains...

title: Encounter! Classmates
overview: The students realize that they're all from other worlds, and begin to share their backgrounds. But some are luckier than others...

title: Explosion! Talent Show
overview: It's time for the talent show, but none of the students are talented at all. The KonoSuba crowd in particular...

title: Decision! Class Rep
overview: It's time to pick the class rep! But Aqua doesn't want Ains to do it, and Albedo doesn't want Aqua anywhere near the job.

title: Carry Out! Class Rep
overview: Emilia's the class rep now, but it's really hard. But she wants to do her best!

title: Prepare! Field Trip
overview: It's time for a field trip to the beach, and the gang's getting ready. But who wants to see Kazuma in a swimsuit?

title: Enjoy! Field Trip
overview: The field trip is here, and it's great! Everybody's at the beach and having a great time. But Tanya hears something that makes her upset...

title: Join In! Rivals
overview: It's time for Field Day, and Roswaal hints that whoever wins will get to go home. But then they meet their opponents...

title: Work Together! Field Day
overview: Field Day is here, and it's lots of fun for everyone. There's tug of war, scavenger hunts... and giant robots?!

title: Band Together! Quartet
overview: The mobile fortress "Destroyer" has joined the last game! It's up to the quartet to grab its headband and win the game.

title: Join the Fight! Transfer Student
overview: The students have now finally settled into their new lives, but a new student has come to the school, and his name is… "Shield"?

title: Sneak In! The Principal's Office
overview: Life's great in this world, except for one thing: there's no alcohol! When the students sneak into the principal's office to get their fix from his stash, they run into more than they bargained for.

title: Uh-Oh! Detention!
overview: This new world is a great place: no fighting, no danger, and the classes are easy. But you REALLY don't want to get detention!

title: Pinch! Test of Learning
overview: It's time for a test! Everybody expects Ains to score highly, but… he never even passed middle school!

title: Work Hard! Valentine's Day
overview: It's Valentine's Day, which means it's time to give chocolate to the boy you like! But an unexpected face makes an appearance…

title: Clash! Dodgeball
overview: It's time for a battle to settle the most important question of all: what do you put on your chicken wings?

title: Excitement! Physicals Day
overview: It's time for physicals, and everybody's ready to get naked and get on the scale! Who will be brave enough to go peek at the opposite sex?

title: Challenge! Part-Time Job
overview: Visha's been working overtime lately. But what does she need the money for?

title: Investigate! First Errand
overview: It's time for a play! But what kind of play should they put on? Filo will find out!

title: Rise Up! School Festival
overview: It's time for a school festival! But something is lurking outside the school…

title: It Begins! School Festival
overview: The curtain rises on the school festival! There's a special guest, too…

title: The Show Begins! Showtime
overview: The mobile fortress "Destroyer" has joined the last game! It's up to the quartet to grab its headband and win the game.

title: Come Together! School Life
overview: An eminent new student comes to the school.

title: Lurking! Eminence
overview: An eminent shadow lurks in the school.

title: Working Together! Morning Glories
overview: The class works together to grow morning glories.

title: Chaos! Cooking Class!
overview: The class gets together to cook pasta.

title: Attack! Of the Spear Hero
overview: Motoyasu comes to the school, but he sees every girl he meets as a pig.

title: Search! Shadow and Devil
overview: Tanya searches for the identity of the mysterious "Shadow."

title: Slip-Sliding! Ski Trip!
overview: The whole class goes on an exciting ski vacation.

title: Popular! Online Game
overview: Everyone starts skipping when a new hit game comes out.

title: Get Closer! Music Festival
overview: The classes are suddenly told about an upcoming music festival.

title: Terror! Music Festival
overview: The day of the music festival arrives, but, naturally, it won't take place without some setbacks.

title: Melody! Music Festival
overview: The school will have to face a giant zombie bell before receiving the festival prize.
